subcodes.title: Words to a friend from Scotland, spoken on 1913-05-12
subcodes.first_line: We have many friends in Scotland, many devoted friends; amongst them is Mrs Whyte.... There are certain souls whose thirst is never allayed, while others are satisfied with one drop.
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Christian rejection of Baha'u'llah and the Baha'i Faith, @East and West; communication between East and West, @development of capacity and readiness
